meaning: n.序文,绪言,前言vi.作序,写前言vt.为...写序言,开始
examples: The preface of the book includes an account of the author's life.
Remember I asked you from the preface, John Ray's preface, to figure out who Dolly Schiller is, who dies in childbed.
The president of the National Academy, Bruce Alberts, added this key point in the preface to the panel's report: "Science never has all the answers."
The company claims that Preface is power-efficient enough to run for "hundreds of hours" without draining notebook battery power.
But first, since many readers misunderstood my comments last time, I want to preface this with a quick explanation.
